package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_map_any_json_decode_in_hot_path: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag JSON decoding into map[string]any in hot paths where typed structs avoid reflection churn.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule593PositiveRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario593Positive(values []Rule593PositiveRecord) (int, error) {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		data, err := json.Marshal(value)
		if err != nil { return 0, err }
		total += len(data)
	}
	return total, nil
}
